sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, val String, extra Float64);
SELECT toDecimal32OrDefault(AVAIL, 5) AS decimal_val, tupleElement((SELECT val, extra FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), 1) AS retrieved_val FROM test_table;
SELECT extra, toDecimal32OrDefault('0.123456789', 9, toDecimal32OrDefault(val, 4)) AS new_val FROM test_table WHERE extra < 5.0;

SELECT id, val, toDecimal32OrDefault(val, 2) AS parsed_val FROM (SELECT id, toString(extra) AS val FROM test_table) WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table HAVING toDecimal32OrDefault(val, 3) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, toDecimal32OrDefault(NULLIF(val, ''), 3, 0) AS safe_conversion FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, toDecimal32OrDefault(toString(extra), 2) AS decimal_representation FROM test_table GROUP BY decimal_representation HAVING count > 1;
SELECT id, toDecimal32OrDefault(ROUND(extra), 1) AS rounded_val FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE extra > 0.0;
SELECT id, toDecimal32OrDefault(val, 1, -1) AS failed_val FROM temp_table WHERE toDecimal32OrDefault(val, 1) = -1;
